summary: Removed caller-selectable authorization from full private-profile reads: getPrivateNutritionProfile now always requires manage_profile. Added regression proof that a measurement-only viewer can list measurements but remains forbidden from retrieving the sensitive profile. No other authorization boundary changed.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Worker made the scoped edits but did not return within the single-wait limit; the PM interrupted it and independently ran the complete verification.
